title: UN Underground Base 02
wikitext:
[]: UN Underground Base 02?             Quote Post by MAGI » Sat Oct 16, 2004 8:12 am Please try and clear this up with me. It begins with a "Year 2000, Antartica" subtitle, then we see that grainy footage being played. However, the superimposed text in the actual video showed "LOCATION / UN UNDERGROUND BASE 02 / AUG 15 2000 09:31:xx" This confuses me because it said "Antartica", before, and I don't believe there are any underground bases in Antartica. Also, being the 15th, Second Impact would have occured two days ago. So, maybe it meant NOW is the 15th, when they were watching the video afterwards. But if that was it, why did the subtitle say "Antartica"? The reason why I don't think that base was in Antartica was because of the conversation going in the background. I have a translated script (by Aaron Lai, Ben Tredinnick, Rudi Bierach and Jughead of Studio 00') with me and it went: WomanX: Mr. Ikari and the others will arrive on the 11th of this month. ManY: I wish they'd move the smoking corner a little closer. ManZ: I heard that smoking will be banned in the entire building during their visit. WomanX: It'll be better that way.

[]:             Quote Post by Ayanami » Sat Oct 16, 2004 2:14 pm This is a little difficult, as it's been awhile since I've seen that clip, and I don't have D&R to watch, but I'll try... sort of. First of all, 2nd Impact took place on Sept. 13, not Aug. 13. Second, it could just be a mistake on the subtitler's account (or whoever decided that "Year 2000, Antarctica" would go before the clip, or that the superimposed text in the video would say what it did), since mistakes do happen in Evangelion. Another thing, I kind of got the impression that the video was taking place in Antarctica, because after the clip was over, didn't the scene with 2nd Impact occuring start playing? However, if the video was shot in Antarctica, there would be an incredibly teeny-tiny fraction of a chance that it would have survived the explosion of 2nd Impact. Or maybe someone from NERV was secretly taping the discussion, and managed to leave before 2nd Impact occured? I dunno... I'm just doing this all from very vague memory. It'd probably help if I had a refresher.

[]: Re: Video footage in Death & Rebirth confusion             Quote Post by coff » Sat Oct 16, 2004 2:24 pm MAGI wrote: This confuses me because it said "Antartica", before, and I don't believe there are any underground bases in Antartica. Also, being the 15th, Second Impact would have occured two days ago.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Sat Oct 16, 2004 3:32 pm it could have been a streaming feed to the gehirn base in Japan...to give them direct link-up to the antarctic expedition

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Oct 16, 2004 7:07 pm Ayanami wrote: Second, it could just be a mistake on the subtitler's account (or whoever decided that "Year 2000, Antarctica" would go before the clip, or that the superimposed text in the video would say what it did), since mistakes do happen in Evangelion.

[]:             Quote Post by MAGI » Sat Oct 16, 2004 9:47 pm 00 wrote: 2nd Impact took place on Sept. 13, not Aug. 13.

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Sun Oct 17, 2004 3:30 am MAGI wrote: 00 wrote: 2nd Impact took place on Sept. 13, not Aug. 13.

[]:             Quote Post by MAGI » Sun Oct 17, 2004 4:52 am Fifty just so happened to be the number of pages my finished fanfic on Eva had. :P (And congratulations 8))

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Sun Oct 17, 2004 4:38 pm so we are agreeing that the base was underground in what was to be nerv?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Oct 17, 2004 10:16 pm sadsadshinji wrote: so we are agreeing that the base was underground in what was to be nerv?

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Mon Oct 18, 2004 8:45 am i thought hakone was the site of the black moon....nevermind

[]:             Quote Post by Ayanami » Mon Oct 18, 2004 4:25 pm I'm pretty positive that the Geofront that NERV was protected by was the Black Moon. Hmmm... this is getting interesting now.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Mon Oct 18, 2004 6:11 pm no..i thought that hakone was where tokyo 3 was built...

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Wed Aug 02, 2006 7:54 am Timesplitter 01 wrote: MAGI wrote: 00 wrote: 2nd Impact took place on Sept. 13, not Aug. 13.

[]: Re: Video footage in Death & Rebirth confusion             Quote Post by cat42 » Thu Oct 12, 2006 10:07 am MAGI wrote: Please try and clear this up with me. It begins with a "Year 2000, Antartica" subtitle, then we see that grainy footage being played. However, the superimposed text in the actual video showed "LOCATION / UN UNDERGROUND BASE 02 / AUG 15 2000 09:31:xx" This confuses me because it said "Antartica", before, and I don't believe there are any underground bases in Antartica...

[]: Re: Video footage in Death & Rebirth confusion             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Oct 12, 2006 11:19 am cat42 wrote: Perhaps GAINAX decided the UN would have at least 2 Underground Bases in Antarctica. It was always my belief the video was actually shot there.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Oct 12, 2006 12:58 pm Under ground is not readily accessible in much of Antarctica; where there aren't hundreds of meters of ice, there is raw rock. Some facilities may be buried under the snowpack for insulation; though near the coast, where there is some bare rock,ISTR buildings may be raised off the ground. I can only make sense of the backstory if either i) SEELE had made some shrewd guesses about some anomaly spotted in satellite survey, based on their other esoteric knowledge or ii) they had discovered the records of an ill-fated expedition from about 75 years previously, while browsing in the library of a certain New England university (or equivalent on that parallel).

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Oct 12, 2006 1:04 pm Mr. Tines wrote: i) SEELE had made some shrewd guesses about some anomaly spotted in satellite survey, based on their other esoteric knowledge

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Thu Oct 12, 2006 1:59 pm Mr. Tines wrote: ...i) SEELE had made some shrewd guesses about some anomaly spotted in satellite survey, based on their other esoteric knowledge...

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Oct 12, 2006 2:55 pm Mr. Tines wrote: ii) they had discovered the records of an ill-fated expedition from about 75 years previously, while browsing in the library of a certain New England university (or equivalent on that parallel).

Also, being the 15th, Second Impact would have occured two days ago. So, maybe it meant NOW is the 15th, when they were watching the video afterwards.
